name: Pistachio Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) Crushed pineapple with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pistachio pudding, crushed pineapple, and its juice together.
2. Add the miniature marshmallows to the mixture.
3. Stir in the Cool Whip until well combined.
4. Add enough nuts for topping.
5. Mix thoroughly and refrigerate.
